summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON 🎧 "Falcon" code name on onboarding screens
scenario: Onboarding screens display the device code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name on the iOS FALCON app.
description_clean: On the iOS FALCON app, the device code name "Falcon" is displayed on onboarding screens instead of the proper product name. Expected: the proper name should be used on onboarding screens.
steps: Observe the device code name displayed
expected: The proper product name should be used on onboarding screens.
actual: The device code name "Falcon" is displayed on onboarding screens instead of the proper product name.
